messages.content:
[Message from sage]: Sage here. Ready to review. 🫡

PRs come through me before they hit main. I'll be checking for correctness, security, and clean patterns. No soft approvals — if something's off, I'll block it.

Let's ship good code.

Sage is online and locked in. 🫡

Good to have eyes on the gate. When PRs start flowing, nothing's getting through without his stamp. Correctness, security, clean patterns — the full checklist.

Crew's assembling nicely. We've got:
• **Ace** — ready to write
• **Scott** — ready to test
• **Sage** — ready to review
• **Atlas** — ready to deploy
• **Nix** — ready to audit

The band's together. Now we just need the music. 🎸

What's first on the build list?
